matches.matched_text: the mannork of Arrahland oversense he horrhorrd his name in thuthunder

matches.snippet: seen it rudden up in fusefiressence on the flashmurket
matches.reasoning: Fire-essence suggests the reviving element (whiskey/fire imagery) of the Finnegan wake motif

matches.snippet: So mulct per wenche is Elsker woed. Ne hath his thrysting. Fin.
matches.reasoning: Direct spelling of Fin; marks a narrative conclusion/ending reminiscent of the ballad's cyclic structure

matches.snippet: Jazzaphoney and Mirillovis and Nippy she nets best. Fing. Ay, ay! Sobbos.

matches.snippet: gallowsbirds in Arrah-na-Poghue, so silvestrious, neer the Queen's Colleges
